description_long: This induction cooker features a compact, rectangular body with a wood-textured exterior and a black cooktop surface. The front panel is equipped with several round control knobs and buttons, as well as a small red label, likely for branding or power indication. The cooktop itself is a single circular induction zone, surrounded by a slightly raised edge. The sides and back of the cooker are plain, with the rear panel showing a small vent or port. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a blend of natural wood and sleek black elements. The cooker sits on a flat wooden surface, suggesting it is intended for countertop or tabletop use.
description: A compact, wood-finished induction cooker with a single black cooktop and a front panel featuring multiple control knobs and buttons. The design is modern and minimalistic, blending natural and sleek elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with multiple knobs, buttons, and a red label beneath the black cooktop.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden side and the edge of the cooktop, with no controls visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a small vent or port and a plain wooden back, with the cooktop's edge visible.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden side and the cooktop edge, similar to the left side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face, featuring four round knobs aligned horizontally, a row of rectangular buttons to the left, and a small red label or indicator. No digital display or touch areas are visible.
